Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: You regale him with a tale common to most lone-wolf adventurers of Orbis. So common, in fact, that part of you is convinced that French Kweebec has heard it a million times before.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: Regardless of whether he really did or not, he gives you his rapt attention while you describe the very essence of your kind of lifestyle: the aimless exploration, hoping that you'll come across an ancient dungeon--

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: --filled to the brim with the powerful relics of a time long passed, or perhaps a beautiful vista in the endless, untamed wilderness that continues to cover the surface of a planet that seems to be embroiled in some sort of an apocalypse every few centuries.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: Then there are your grand fights in the hearts of Outlander townships, your raids on dragon nests and the effort of combatting Void invasions--

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: --you don't tell him that you are rather fond of *cheesing*, so most of those battles barely ever count as a fair challenge--

Line.Text: --and the uphill climb that is attempting to acquire the coveted Harvest Trophy: Gaia's reward to those who further her mission of Life. He seems to be especially delighted with that one, which is typical of a Kweebec.
